function.message: I couldn’t safely complete this inbox item because the requested project names are not identifiable from canonical project records. I found no canonical project README matching 'house systems layer', and 'attic rainwater rig' did not resolve to a canonical project record either, so I can’t verify the start-date comparison or uniquely support deleting a project.
function.rulebook_notes: Root AGENTS.md says entity/canonical files are authoritative and to ask for clarification instead of guessing when the needed fact is not shown canonically. 40_projects/AGENTS.MD says each project's canonical reference is README.MD inside the project folder. deletion-and-wiping.md says to stop and ask for clarification if visible evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the inbox request uses project names that do not resolve to canonical project README records, so the start dates cannot be verified and the deletion target is not uniquely supported by canonical evidence. Completing any part of the request would require guessing.
